title: Control-plane Claude review and permission audit transition pack

commands.command: claude --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode bypassPermissions --no-session-persistence --tools Read --allowedTools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format stream-json --include-partial-messages --verbose -p <CP00-001 pack-level review prompt>
commands.summary: Single valid CP00-001 pack-level read-only review completed against /tmp/lfos-cp00-001-review-packet.diff.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
This pack preserves existing individual closeout evidence and adds pack-level evidence as the primary completion unit.
The legacy S05 atomic Claude review completed successfully before the pack pivot and is recorded as transition evidence only, not as the required pack-level Claude review.

CP00-001 pack-level Claude review ran exactly once using claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only review. The P1 sequencing finding is fixed by finalizing the pack evidence before the final RP00 gate. The P2 live-count finding is fixed by monotonic snapshot validation rather than exact equality.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only pack-level review completed before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced or synthesized by deterministic synthetic control-plane metadata prechecks because no sensitive production mutation, client-facing output, external sharing, finance action, real data operation, runtime execution, permission engine execution, AuthZ evaluation, security trimming execution, audit write, storage write, database write, or product-state write occurs.
evidence_summary.pack_boundary: CP00-001 groups existing RP00.P02.M04.S06-S14 closeout evidence and current RP00.P02.M05.S05 implementation under a Risk A pack without treating approximately 1,000 packs as equal-sized arithmetic buckets.
